mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TF_PROJECT_PK.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO TF_PROJECT( ID, OWNER_USER_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES( #{id}, #{ownerUserId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_PROJECT SET OWNER_USER_ID = #{ownerUserId}, NAME = #{name}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, STATUS = #{status}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
